projects.sectionSubtitle: Web development projects and applications ranging from business management systems to

items.title: AlineaDent - Dental Clinic Management System
items.desc: Comprehensive dental clinic management system built with Next.js and Python/FastAPI. Manages patients, appointments, and dental treatments with visual calendar, integrated WhatsApp communication, AI conversation monitoring, and automatic report generation.

items.title: Work Orders Management System - Atta Montacargas
items.desc: Mobile application for work order management developed with React Native and FastAPI. It includes user role management, work order creation and tracking, automatic PDF generation, a real-time metrics dashboard, and a complete status management system.

items.title: Muscle Factory Gym Website
items.desc: Informational gym website developed with Astro and React. Features service sections, supplement comparison tool with functional shopping cart, detailed product catalog, and comprehensive personal training information.

items.title: E-Commerce Frontend
items.desc: Modern e-commerce platform built with React and Tailwind CSS. Features interactive shopping cart, advanced filtering system, category navigation, detailed product views, and fully responsive design.

aboutMe.p1: Hello! I'm <highlight>Víctor Ángel López Romero</highlight>, a 22-year-old AI Software Engineer from Guanajuato, México. My fascination with Artificial Intelligence started during university when I was amazed by how AI could perform seemingly complex tasks. After deep research, I discovered that AI is actually a beautiful combination of <highlight>pure mathematics, algorithms, logical reasoning, and immense computing power</highlight>.
aboutMe.p2: This revelation fascinated me because I found a field where I could apply all my mathematical knowledge and unlock its true potential. By combining Artificial Intelligence with modern web development — with <highlight>JavaScript being my gateway into programming</highlight> — I now focus on creating <highlight>intelligent applications that enhance productivity</highlight> and help people save valuable time.
